claim_text: More complex multi-agent orchestration did not reliably improve results under stricter evaluation.
mechanism_text: The paper offers a bounded mechanism that the ACT phase relies on visible test cases that can miss edge cases, so apparent gains under lighter testing may not survive stricter evaluation with broader test coverage.
bounds: This is a paper-reported explanation tied to the tested workflow and benchmarks, not a fully established causal proof that generalizes beyond this study.
